overall_summary: The mapping accurately captures the primary technical controls (MFA and Password Strength) that constitute 'secure log-on procedures' for customer-facing applications. Rationales demonstrate clear understanding of scope and intent, explicitly acknowledging subset relationships. No critical false negatives or rule violations were detected.

per_mapping_verdicts.judge_note: Direct mechanism match for externally-exposed/customer-facing applications. MFA is correctly identified as the primary action for secure log-on. Rationale ties external requirement directly to internal objective.

Correctly identified as a PARTIAL subset addressing credential strength. Rationale explicitly acknowledges scope difference (assets vs apps) and supports the 'secure' aspect of the log-on procedure without overstating coverage.
